Title: missing pickup
ExpectedInScript: 400 + message 'pickup is required' + no booking created

Title: no drivers online
ExpectedInScript: booking status REQUESTED/PENDING/FAILED + no assigned driver + message No drivers available

Title: invalid payment method
ExpectedInScript: 400 + Invalid payment method + no booking created

Title: pricing demand=0
ExpectedInScript: 200 + surge >= 1 + valid non-negative price (no divide-by-zero behavior)

Title: AI selects valid driver
ExpectedInScript: 200 + selected_driver exists, belongs to driver list, and is online

Title: publish ride_requested
ExpectedInScript: 201 + booking REQUESTED + topic ride_events + eventType ride_requested + queued=true

Title: API Gateway routes booking correctly
ExpectedInScript: POST /v1/bookings is routed to booking service and returns valid booking response

Title: transaction create success
ExpectedInScript: 201 + status REQUESTED + booking_id exists + DB committed (read-after-write ok)

Title: payment failed -> booking rollback
ExpectedInScript: booking status FAILED/CANCELLED + no charge + no dangling state

Title: idempotent duplicate request
ExpectedInScript: same booking_id replayed; no duplicate transaction/double charge

Title: concurrent race condition
ExpectedInScript: no duplicate booking; conflict/lock resolved or replay same booking

Title: saga failure compensation
ExpectedInScript: booking success -> payment FAILED -> compensation makes booking CANCELLED (+ REFUNDED when needed)

Title: outbox consistency
ExpectedInScript: 201 + booking REQUESTED + outbox events queued to correct topic/event type

Title: partial failure payment timeout
ExpectedInScript: retry/fallback works; no inconsistent or stuck transaction state

Title: Recommendation strict
ExpectedInScript: 200 + top_3 has exactly 3 unique drivers + selected belongs to top_3 + reason exists

Title: Model version strict
ExpectedInScript: 200 + model_version returned correctly and not mixed

Title: Abnormal input strict
ExpectedInScript: outlier distance=1000km: model does not crash, returns reasonable output or reject (no 5xx)
